feat.name: Great Tengu Form
feat.text: You take on the imposing form of a large, winged spirit. Once per day, as part of using Long-Nosed Form, you also gain the benefits of 4th-rank *enlarge* and fly. This lasts for 5 minutes or until you shift out of your Long-Nosed Form, whichever happens first.

traits.name: Tengu
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the tengu ancestry. Tengu are humanoids who resemble crows. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by tengu. An item with this trait is created and used by tengu.
